summary: A Newsmax 'The Count' broadcast panel discussion that cuts to a 'WORST OF THE WORST - 6/20 ICE ARRESTS' graphic showing five named mugshots. It is a recorded TV news segment with breaking-news lower-thirds about Trump landing at Joint Base Andrews, not a produced, music-driven, or stylized youth-appeal edit.
notable_text: On-screen graphic 'WORST OF THE WORST - 6/20 ICE ARRESTS' with names (Marlon Enrique Najar, Jusselo Dias Dos Reis, Alvaro De Jesus Martinez Juarez, Julian Silva Ibbara, Oluwaseun Kassim); chyrons 'TRUMP LANDS AT JOINT BASE ANDREWS'; THE COUNT / NEWSMAX bugs.
